allow:
Bash(for skill in commit-hygiene sanitize-comments ddd-boundary-check breaking-change-detection release-control secure-coding pr-review adr-compliance naming-conventions documentation-completeness dependency-audit test-coverage observability-compliance spec-driven accessibility performance-profiling; do 
  quick="/d/github/enterprise-bmad/.enterprise/governance/agent-skills/$skill/SKILL-QUICK.md"
  full="/d/github/enterprise-bmad/.enterprise/governance/agent-skills/$skill/SKILL.md"
  [ -f "$quick" ] && echo "✓ $skill QUICK" || echo "✗ $skill QUICK MISSING"
  [ -f "$full" ] && echo "✓ $skill FULL" || echo "✗ $skill FULL MISSING"
done 2>&1)
